rootCause: ProgressBar and RemainingTime maintained their own intervals so they kept ticking while paused, and the process timing model lacked a stable effective start time, causing progress resets and jumps on resume.
resolution: Reworked process pause/resume timing to use integer elapsed milliseconds with a stable effective start time, removed child component intervals so updates only occur via the parent poller, and added unit/component tests to cover pause, resume, and legacy paused state handling.
